The Edge

Amateurs Force Entries.
We Wait For The Pullback.

The market is designed to trap impatient retail traders. The Pullback Methodology is an institutional-grade system focused purely on liquidity sweeps, premium/discount arrays, and high-probability retracements. We don't predict; we react to confirmed order flow.

Mechanical Execution

Remove emotion with strict, rule-based entry models.

Flawless Risk Management

Capital preservation is priority. Never risk more than 1%.

Live Trading Sessions

Watch over my shoulder 3x a week as we execute the Pullback strategy live in real time.

Elite Signals

Pullback Bootcamp

Comprehensive bootcamp video library with downloadable resources and step-by-step strategy training. Master the Pullback method from foundation to advanced execution.

Trading Psychology

Master your mind. Learn advanced techniques to handle drawdowns, avoid tilt, and execute without hesitation.

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before joining Premium.

Yes. Premium is beginner friendly because the SRE Mini Mentorship Bootcamp starts from zero and breaks everything down step by step. You do not need to already understand trading. We walk through the basics, the setups, the rules, and how to read the market with structure.

We focus on YM and GC, which are also commonly known as US30 and Gold. Keeping the focus tight helps members avoid random setups and learn the exact markets we trade every day.

We send signals daily, usually 1–3 depending on market conditions. The goal is not to spam trades. We take the best setups possible, and if the market does not give us an A+ setup, we do not force a trade.

Premium includes live trading Monday through Friday from 8 PM to 10 PM EST, 24/7 YM signal access, daily trade recaps, the SRE Mini Mentorship Bootcamp, monthly funded account giveaways, and Sunday class at 9 PM EST where we backtest the week, teach lessons, and go over the upcoming market outlook.

No. Signals are part of it, but the goal is also to help you understand why the setup matters. You get live trading, trade recaps, Sunday lessons, and mentorship style breakdowns so you can learn the process instead of blindly copying entries.

You can join through Whop and get access to the Premium community. If you are not ready yet, join the free Discord first, watch the webinar, and see how the community works before upgrading.

Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: May 13, 2026

1. Information We Collect

Pullback Trading may collect information you voluntarily provide through our website forms, including your name, email address, phone number, trading experience, and any message you submit.

2. How We Use Your Information

We use your information to register you for webinars, send webinar access details, send webinar reminders, respond to inquiries, provide updates about our services, and improve our website and user experience.

3. SMS Communications

If you provide your phone number and consent to receive text messages, Pullback Trading may send SMS messages related to webinar registration confirmations, webinar reminders, event access updates, and support related to your registration. Message and data rates may apply. Message frequency may vary. Reply STOP to opt out and HELP for help.

4. No Sale of Personal Information

We do not sell your personal information. We do not share your phone number with third parties for their own marketing purposes.

5. Service Providers

We may use trusted third party providers to operate our website, collect form submissions, send emails, process communications, manage webinar reminders, and support business operations. These providers are only given the information needed to perform their services.

6. Cookies and Tracking

Our website may use cookies, analytics tools, pixels, or similar technologies to understand website traffic, improve performance, and measure marketing effectiveness. You can adjust cookie preferences through your browser settings.

7. Data Security

We take reasonable steps to protect the information submitted through our website. However, no online system can be guaranteed to be completely secure.

8. Your Choices

You may request that we update, delete, or stop using your information by contacting us. You may unsubscribe from SMS messages at any time by replying STOP.

9. Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at support@pullbacktrading.net.

Legal

Terms and Conditions

Last updated: May 13, 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing this website, submitting a form, registering for a webinar, or using Pullback Trading services, you agree to these Terms and Conditions.

2. Educational Purpose Only

Pullback Trading provides trading education, market education, community resources, and training content for informational and educational purposes only. Nothing on this website, in our webinars, or in our communications should be considered financial, investment, legal, tax, or professional advice.

3. No Guarantees

We do not guarantee profits, payouts, funded accounts, trading success, specific results, or financial outcomes. Trading involves risk, and past results do not guarantee future performance.

4. User Responsibility

You are responsible for your own trading decisions, risk management, account activity, and financial choices. You should only trade with capital you can afford to lose and should consult a qualified professional when needed.

5. Webinar and SMS Reminders

When you register for a webinar and provide your phone number with consent, you agree to receive SMS messages related to webinar registration confirmations, webinar reminders, and event access updates. Message and data rates may apply. Message frequency may vary. Reply STOP to opt out and HELP for help.

6. Intellectual Property

All website content, branding, graphics, text, training materials, webinar content, and other Pullback Trading materials are owned by Pullback Trading or used with permission. You may not copy, distribute, resell, or reproduce our content without written permission.

7. Third Party Links

Our website may include links to third party platforms, partners, payment pages, communities, or tools. We are not responsible for the content, policies, or practices of third party websites.

8. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Pullback Trading is not liable for losses, damages, trading losses, missed opportunities, service interruptions, or any indirect or consequential damages related to your use of the website, webinars, communications, or services.

9. Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms and Conditions at any time. Continued use of the website or services after updates means you accept the revised terms.

10. Contact Us

If you have questions about these Terms and Conditions, contact us at support@pullbacktrading.net.
